_readme: Site-wide info. Edit these values and the whole site updates. See README.md.
_showScheduleDatesNote: false = hide all game DATES site-wide (schedule shows 'TBD', the homepage 'Next fixture' shows 'To be announced') so nothing misleads before the schedule is confirmed. Flip to true once every date is approved and all dates appear at once. Real dates stay in schedule.json either way. A game with "hidden": true (e.g. Wake Forest, pending) is left off entirely until that flag is removed.
_beholdNote: beholdFeedId powers the Instagram grid on the homepage. It pulls from behold.so (connected to @gsueagleslax). To change accounts, make a new feed at behold.so and paste its ID here.
_tiktokNote: Leave tiktok as "" until the exact handle is confirmed. An empty string hides the link rather than shipping a broken one.
_assetsNote: crest is STILL a placeholder — no real logo file was provided yet (see ASSETS-NEEDED.md). fieldPhoto and heroVideo now use real team media. To swap the crest later, drop the real file at public/brand/ and update the path here.
_nextFixtureNote: There is no separate 'next event' setting. The home page shows the first game in schedule.json that has no result recorded. Add games there and the home page follows automatically.
